current_entries.en_definition: A country in Central Africa. Official name: Republic of Chad.
Lake Chad (a freshwater lake at the junction of Nigeria, Niger, Chad and Cameroon in Central Africa).
A series of interconnected rings or links usually made of metal.
A series of stores or businesses with the same brand name.

(algebraic topology, originally) A formal sum of cells in a CW complex of a certain dimension k (in which case the formal sums are called k-chains); a formal sum of simplices or cubes of a certain dimension in a simplical complex or cubical complex (respectively).
A person presiding over a meeting.
The head of a corporate or governmental board of directors, a committee, or other formal entity.
The room used for deliberation by a legislature.
(figuratively) The legislature or division of the legislature itself.
Any enclosed space occupying or similar to a room.
(firearms) The area holding the ammunition round at the initiation of its discharge.
(firearms) One of the bullet-holding compartments in the cylinder of a revolver.
A room or set of rooms, particularly:
Happening by chance, casual.

current_entries.en_definition: An opportunity or possibility.
Random occurrence; luck.
The probability of something happening.
To sing, especially without instruments, and as applied to monophonic and pre-modern music.
A document issued by some authority, creating a public or private institution, and defining its purposes and privileges.
Someone who cheats.

examples.english: It is wrong to cheat at cards.

current_entries.en_definition: (card games) A card game where the goal is to have no cards remaining in a hand, often by telling lies.
(video games) A hidden means of gaining an unfair advantage in a video game, often by entering a cheat code.
(intransitive) To violate rules in order to gain, or attempt to gain, advantage from a situation.
(transitive) To deceive; to fool; to trick.
Of a small bird, to make short, high-pitched sounds.
(UK, Ireland, Commonwealth, informal) Goodbye, an interjection said upon parting.
(rare) Hello; a greeting.
A dark, reddish-brown colour, as seen on the fruit of the chestnut tree.
To crush with the teeth by repeated closing and opening of the jaws; done to food to soften it and break it down by the action of saliva before it is swallowed.
A small piece broken from a larger piece of solid material.
(games, gambling) A token used in place of cash.
(electronics) A circuit fabricated in one piece on a small, thin substrate; a microchip.
(Greek mythology) An old, wise centaur who served as Achilles' mentor and teacher.
(astronomy, astrology) A centaur (minor planet) and comet-like/asteroid-like object, orbiting between Saturn and Uranus.
(music) A harmonic set of three or more notes that is heard as if sounding simultaneously.
(rail) A section of subsidiary railway track that interconnects two primary tracks that cross at different levels, to permit traffic to flow between them.
(computing) A keyboard shortcut that involves two or more distinct keypresses, such as Ctrl+M followed by P.
(slang, South Africa) To eat.
(Christianity) The anointed one, the savior predicted by the Old Testament.
(Christianity) A title given to Jesus of Nazareth, seen as the fulfiller of the messianic prophecy.
A part of something that has been separated; a generally squat, thick, irregular piece of something, e.g. wood or stone.

current_entries.en_definition: (computing) A discrete segment of a file, stream, etc. (especially one that represents audiovisual media); a block.
(countable, Christianity) A Christian house of worship; a building where Christian religious services take place. [from 9th c.]
A local group of people who follow the same Christian religious beliefs, local or general. [from 9th c.]
Organized religion in general or a specific religion considered as a political institution.
(uncountable, countable, as bare noun) Christian worship held at a church; service. [from 10th c.]
A framework, trough, or tube, upon or through which objects are made to slide from a higher to a lower level, or through which water passes to a wheel.
A popular fairy tale embodying a classic folk tale myth-element of unjust oppression and triumphant reward.
The main character in this story, a mistreated and impoverished girl.
A deep red mineral, mercuric sulfide, HgS; the principal ore of mercury; such ore used as the pigment vermilion.
A bright red colour tinted with orange.
A numeric character.
A method of transforming a text in order to conceal its meaning.
A person able to see things that cannot be perceived by the normal senses
A person able to foresee the future
(ambitransitive) To climb (something) with some difficulty, or in a haphazard fashion.
A device with interlocking parts used for fastening things together, such as a fastener or a holder.

current_entries.en_definition: (informal, music) Describing art music (rather than pop, jazz, blues, etc), especially when played using instruments of the orchestra.

examples.english: Which do you like better, rock music or classical music?

current_entries.en_definition: Of or pertaining to the ancient Greeks and Romans, especially to Greek or Roman authors of the highest rank, or of the period when their best literature was produced; of or pertaining to places inhabited by the ancient Greeks and Romans, or rendered famous by their deeds.
Conforming to the best authority in literature and art; chaste; pure; refined
(intransitive) To practise the sport of climbing.

examples.english: It is easy for a monkey to climb a tree.

current_entries.en_definition: A living organism (originally a plant) produced asexually from a single ancestor, to which it is genetically identical.
(cytology) A group of identical cells derived from a single cell.
A copy or imitation of something already existing, especially when designed to simulate it.
(intransitive) To make low clicking sounds (refers to hens).
(transitive) To cause (the tongue) to make a clicking sound.
A device to interrupt power transmission, commonly used to separate the engine and gearbox in a car. [from 19th c.]
The pedal in a car that disengages power and torque transmission from the engine (through the drivetrain) to the drive wheels.
A black or brownish black rock formed from prehistoric plant remains, composed largely of carbon and burned as a fuel.
A piece of coal used for burning (this use is less common in American English)
(military slang, WWI, _, ‚Äì, _, WWII) Bombs emitting black smoke on impact.
The silky case spun by the larvae of some insects in which they metamorphose, protecting the pupa within.

current_entries.en_definition: (US, especially, Southern US, informal) Any soft drink, regardless of type.
Solid residue from roasting coal in a coke oven; used principally as a fuel and in the production of steel and formerly as a domestic fuel.
(intransitive) To move nearer to the point of perspective.

examples.english: I'll call them tomorrow when I come back.

current_entries.en_definition: Synonym of let's go, a cheer or expression of support, encouragement, &c.
An expression of frustration, exasperation, or impatience; hurry up.
An expression of disbelief.
An order to do something.
(computing) A directive to a computer program acting as an interpreter of some kind, in order to perform a specific task.
(ambitransitive) To order, give orders; to compel or direct with authority.
A spoken or written remark.

current_entries.en_definition: (programming) A remark embedded in source code in such a way that it will be ignored by the compiler or interpreter, typically to help people to understand the code.
A sending or mission (to do or accomplish something).
The thing to be done as agent for another.
A body or group of people, officially tasked with carrying out a particular function.
A fee charged by an agent or broker for carrying out a transaction.
The act of committing (e.g. a crime or error).

(transitive) To assess the similarities and differences between two or more things ["to compare X with Y"]. Having made the comparison of X with Y, one might have found it similar to Y or different from Y.

current_entries.en_definition: The quality, colour, or appearance of the skin on the face.
To approach or meet in a common center; to consolidate.

current_entries.en_definition: An agreement in a design or plan; a union formed by mutual communication of opinions and views; an accordance in a scheme; harmony; a simultaneous action.

current_entries.en_definition: Musical accordance or harmony; concord.
A musical performance, usually public, in which several performers or instruments take part.
(Asian, _, cuisine) A type of thick rice porridge or soup, sometimes prepared with vegetables and/or meat.

examples.english: I've had black rice congee thrice in one day!

current_entries.en_definition: Congo, Democratic Republic of the Congo (a country in Central Africa, larger and to the east of the Republic of the Congo; official name: Democratic Republic of the Congo; capital: Kinshasa).
Congo, Republic of the Congo (a country in Central Africa, smaller and to the west of the Democratic Republic of the Congo; official name: Republic of the Congo; capital: Brazzaville).

A major river in Central Africa which flows for about 4,380 km (2,720 miles) to the Atlantic Ocean in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, at times forming the border with the Republic of the Congo and Angola.
The shelf- or bracket-shaped fruiting body of a bracket fungus (also called a shelf fungus), i.e. a mushroom growing off a tree trunk.
(phonetics) A sound that results from the passage of air through restrictions of the oral cavity; any sound that is not the dominant sound of a syllable, the dominant sound generally being a vowel.

(grammar) A functional element of a phrase or clause

Each of the traditional main regions into which the Earth‚Äôs land surface is divided, including both an extent of mainland and various conventionally associated islands, etc; namely, Africa, Europe, Asia, Australasia/Oceania, North America, South America, and Antarctica.

(formal, intransitive) To talk; to engage in conversation.
A reddish-brown, malleable, ductile metallic element with high electrical and thermal conductivity, symbol Cu, and atomic number 29.
The center or inner part of a space or area.

current_entries.en_definition: The central part of a fruit, containing the kernels or seeds.
The most important part of a thing or aggregate of things wherever located and whether of any determinate location at all; the essence.

(computer hardware) An individual computer processor, in the sense when several processors (called cores or CPU cores) are plugged together in one single integrated circuit to work as one (called a multi-core processor).
(engineering, manufacturing) The portion of a mold that creates a cavity or impression within the part (casting or molded part) or that makes a hole in or through the part.

A piece of ferromagnetic material (e.g., soft iron), inside the windings of an electromagnet, that channels the magnetic field.
A cylindrical sample of rock or other materials obtained by core drilling.

A bottle stopper made from this or any other material.
(botany, uncountable) The dead protective tissue between the bark and cambium in woody plants, with suberin deposits making it impervious to gasses and water.
An enclosure for livestock, especially a circular one.
(of a place, or, institution) Composed of people from all over the world.

current_entries.en_definition: (figuratively) The place of origin, or in which anything is nurtured or protected in the earlier period of existence.

current_entries.en_definition: (countable, plural craft) A vehicle designed for navigation in or on water or air or through outer space [since the 17th century].

Crepe paper; thin, crinkled tissue paper.

The value of such a derived function for a given value of its independent variable: the rate of change of a function at a point in its domain.

(of a function of a single variable f(x)) The derived function of f(x): the function giving the instantaneous rate of change of f; equivalently, the function giving the slope of the line tangent to the graph of f. Written f'(x) or \frac{df}{dx} in Leibniz's notation, \dot{f}(x) in Newton's notation (the latter used particularly when the independent variable is time).
Usually of a place: abandoned, deserted, or uninhabited.

(intransitive) To get free; to free oneself.
